hotels.name: Newport Beachside Hotel & Resort
hotels.address: 16701 Collins Avenue, Sunny Isles Beach, Miami, FL 33160
hotels.notes: Family-friendly resort with supervised kids' activities and direct beach access

activities.title: Arrival & Beach Time
activities.description: Arrive in Miami at 12:15 PM, pick up rental car, check into hotel by 3:00 PM. Spend the afternoon relaxing on the beach and exploring the resort. Let kids enjoy the pool.
activities.notes: Easy first day to adjust and enjoy the resort amenities

activities.title: Miami Seaquarium Adventure
activities.description: Visit the Miami Seaquarium on Virginia Key. See dolphin and sea lion shows, touch tanks, tropical reef exhibits, and meet manatees. Plan for 4-5 hours.
activities.notes: Arrive early to see all shows. Bring sunscreen and hats.

activities.title: Dinner at Rusty Pelican
activities.description: Family-friendly seafood restaurant on Key Biscayne with stunning views of Biscayne Bay and Miami skyline. Kids' menu available.

activities.title: Beach Day & Kids' Club
activities.description: Morning beach time with the family. After lunch, kids can join the hotel's supervised kids' club (2-4 PM) while parents relax by the pool or enjoy spa time. Evening family time at the beach.
activities.notes: Kids' club included with resort stay

activities.title: Casual Dinner at Hotel Restaurant
activities.description: Dine at the hotel's beachfront restaurant for convenience

activities.title: South Beach & Lincoln Road
activities.description: Drive to South Beach (20 minutes). Walk along the famous beach, see Art Deco architecture, and explore Lincoln Road Mall for shopping and lunch. Kids will enjoy street performers and gelato shops.

activities.title: Dinner at Monty's Raw Bar
activities.description: Casual waterfront seafood restaurant in Coconut Grove with outdoor seating, live music, and beautiful marina views. Very family-friendly with a relaxed atmosphere.
activities.notes: Kids can watch boats while dining

activities.title: Jungle Island
activities.description: Visit Jungle Island, an interactive zoological park featuring exotic animals, bird shows, and a playground. Kids can interact with lemurs, flamingos, and parrots.
activities.notes: Great for young children, very interactive

activities.title: Final Beach Afternoon & Pool Time
activities.description: Return to hotel for final beach and pool time. Pack and prepare for departure tomorrow.
activities.notes: Enjoy last moments at the resort

activities.title: Farewell Dinner at Garcia's Seafood Grille & Fish Market
activities.description: Authentic waterfront seafood restaurant on the Miami River. Family-friendly with fresh catch and beautiful water views. Kids' menu available.
activities.notes: Great way to end the trip with fresh local seafood

activities.title: Departure Day
activities.description: Check out by 11:00 AM. Return rental car at Miami International Airport. Depart on JetBlue flight at 6:45 PM, arriving Boston at 10:30 PM.
activities.notes: Consider arriving at airport by 4:45 PM for domestic flight

plan.reasoning:
This itinerary successfully meets all the specified constraints:

1. **Budget**: Total cost is $3,900, which is under the $4,000 budget
   - Flights: $1,480 (round-trip for 4)
   - Hotel: $1,400 (5 nights at family resort)
   - Activities & Dining: $980

2. **Dates & Duration**: August 1-6, 2026 (5 nights/6 days) from Boston to Miami

3. **Family Requirements**: 
   - Selected Newport Beachside Hotel & Resort with kids' club (ages 4-12), two pools, and beachfront access
   - All activities are age-appropriate for 5 and 8-year-old children
   - Miami Seaquarium visit included on Day 2
   - Multiple family-friendly seafood restaurants with ocean/water views (Rusty Pelican, Monty's Raw Bar, Garcia's)

4. **Flight Selection**: JetBlue offers direct flights from Boston to Miami with family-friendly service and reasonable pricing

5. **Activities Balance**: Mix of educational attractions (Seaquarium, Jungle Island), beach time, resort amenities, and dining experiences that cater to young children while providing relaxation opportunities for parents

The itinerary provides a well-paced vacation with built-in flexibility, avoiding over-scheduling while ensuring the family experiences Miami's best family attractions within budget.
plan.final_message_to_user:
🌴 **Your Miami Family Beach Vacation Itinerary** 🌴

I've planned a fantastic 5-day Miami beach vacation for your family of 4 that stays within your $4,000 budget!

**✈️ FLIGHTS - $1,480**
- **Outbound**: JetBlue B6 1471 on Aug 1 (8:30 AM - 12:15 PM)
- **Return**: JetBlue B6 1672 on Aug 6 (6:45 PM - 10:30 PM)

**🏨 ACCOMMODATION - $1,400**
**Newport Beachside Hotel & Resort** (5 nights)
- Family suite with ocean views
- Kids' club for ages 4-12 ✓
- Two outdoor pools ✓
- Direct beach access
- Mini-golf and water sports

**🎯 HIGHLIGHTS**
- **Day 2**: Miami Seaquarium adventure with dolphin shows and manatee encounters
- **Day 3**: Beach day with kids' club time (parents get a break!)
- **Day 4**: South Beach exploration and Lincoln Road Mall
- **Day 5**: Jungle Island with interactive animal experiences

**🦞 DINING**
Three amazing family-friendly seafood restaurants with water views:
- Rusty Pelican (Biscayne Bay views)
- Monty's Raw Bar (marina setting)
- Garcia's Seafood Grille (Miami River)

**💰 TOTAL COST: $3,900** (Under budget by $100!)

Your kids will love the Seaquarium, beach time, and interactive animal experiences, while you'll enjoy beautiful ocean views, great seafood, and a resort with amenities that give everyone time to relax. Have a wonderful trip! 🌊☀️
